title: Claim Ratio (CALCULATE & FILTER)
description: Computes the net claim ratio by dividing total settled/approved claim amounts against total premium using CALCULATE with ALL() to remove slicer context. Used in executive dashboards to monitor portfolio health in real time.
code:
Claim Ratio = 
VAR TotalClaims = 
    CALCULATE(
        SUM(FactClaims[ClaimAmount]),
        FILTER(
            ALL(FactClaims[ClaimStatus]),
            FactClaims[ClaimStatus] = "Settled" || FactClaims[ClaimStatus] = "Approved"
        )
    )
VAR TotalPremium = 
    CALCULATE(
        SUM(FactPolicies[PremiumAmount]),
        ALL(FactPolicies[PolicyStatus])
    )
RETURN
    DIVIDE(TotalClaims, TotalPremium, 0)

title: Dynamic KPI Selector (SWITCH & SELECTEDVALUE)
description: Powers a field-parameter-driven KPI card that dynamically switches between Revenue, Claims, Loss Ratio, and SLA Breaches based on user slicer selection. Eliminates the need for multiple separate measures on the report canvas.
code:
Selected Metric Value = 
VAR SelectedMetric = SELECTEDVALUE(DimMetricSelector[MetricName], "Revenue")
RETURN
    SWITCH(
        SelectedMetric,
        "Revenue", SUM(FactSales[Revenue]),
        "Claims", SUM(FactClaims[ClaimAmount]),
        "Loss Ratio", [Claim Ratio],
        "SLA Breaches", COUNTROWS(FILTER(FactClaims, FactClaims[SettlementDays] > 30)),
        BLANK()
    )

title: Dynamic Title for KPI Cards (Interactivity)
description: Generates context-aware titles for report visuals that update automatically based on region and date slicer selections. Improves report readability and eliminates manual title editing when sharing reports across business units.
code:
Dynamic KPI Title = 
VAR SelectedRegion = SELECTEDVALUE(DimRegion[RegionName], "All Regions")
VAR MinSelectedDate = MIN('Date'[Date])
VAR MaxSelectedDate = MAX('Date'[Date])
VAR FormatStart = FORMAT(MinSelectedDate, "MMM YYYY")
VAR FormatEnd = FORMAT(MaxSelectedDate, "MMM YYYY")
RETURN
    "Performance for " & SelectedRegion & " (" & FormatStart & " - " & FormatEnd & ")"
